messages.data:
Matrix.GeneralLinearGroup.isParabolic_iff_of_upperTriangular_of_det.{u_2} {K : Type u_2} [Field K] [LinearOrder K]
  [IsStrictOrderedRing K] {g : GL (Fin 2) K}
  (h_det : Matrix.GeneralLinearGroup.det g = 1 ∨ Matrix.GeneralLinearGroup.det g = -1) (hg10 : ↑g 1 0 = 0) :
  g.IsParabolic ↔
    (∃ x, x ≠ 0 ∧ g = Matrix.GeneralLinearGroup.upperRightHom x) ∨
      ∃ x, x ≠ 0 ∧ g = -Matrix.GeneralLinearGroup.upperRightHom x

Matrix.twoBlockTriangular_det.{v, u_3} {m : Type u_3} {R : Type v} [CommRing R] [DecidableEq m] [Fintype m]
  (M : Matrix m m R) (p : m → Prop) [DecidablePred p] (h : ∀ (i : m), ¬p i → ∀ (j : m), p j → M i j = 0) :
